comments.post_body:
After 27 years of working, I've decided to retire from corporate jobs. Today was my last day at GoDaddy, which thankfully has been the most fulfilling stint of all. I am now shifting the gears down from 'what I have to do' to 'what I want to do'. It is a blessing to be able to make that decision at my own terms, and I am forever grateful.
 
After the first 20+ years of life focused on learning, the next 25+ years focused on earning, I am entering the third phase - giving. This includes giving my time back to people who gave it all for me to have it all. This includes giving myself & family back the things that were put off in favor of a career. And in a small way, if possible, give back to the community around me.
 
As I reflect on my journey, I reminisce what the Tiny Dragon said. It's the company that I will miss the most - the people whom I shared this journey with. And that's what it's all about.
 
Thank you for giving me company.
 
 Onwards & upwards!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on their retirement from corporate jobs after 27 years, specifically thanking them for sharing their journey and expressing gratitude for the company and people they've worked with. The author is now entering a new phase of life focused on giving back to their loved ones and community.

comments.comment_body: Michal Nowak Cześć! Dude you still have that screenshot? Fun fun times!!
